[[IPV-1 System Patrol Craft]] '''Iphige''' was an [[Airam (group)|Airam]] starship. Present as defense at [[Goff Platform|''Goff'']] space platform during [[Task Force Vengeance]]'s attack there, it sought to engage [[Avenger Squadron]] but was soon destroyed.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
